content.speakerText: Alright, I’ve got a meeting in five—gotta run!
content.speakerTextCn: 好了，我五分钟后开会，得走了！
expectedAnswers: Go crush it! Text me after—we’ll plan dinner!
You’ve got this! Let me know how it goes!
Bye! Hope your meeting goes amazing!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了告别并传递鼓励或期待后续联系
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者的口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了如 'crush it', 'text me', 'plan' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: You’re the real MVP—don’t forget to take a breath sometimes!
content.speakerTextCn: 你真是真·MVP，记得偶尔喘口气啊！
expectedAnswers: Haha, I’ll try—thanks for having my back!
Thanks! I’m learning to slow down—appreciate you reminding me!
MVP? I’m just lucky. Talk tomorrow?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了赞美并表达感激或谦逊
语言准确性：是否正确使用了 'have my back', 'take a breath' 等表达
表达自然度：语气是否真诚、符合亲密对话风格
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'MVP', 'have my back', 'talk tomorrow' 等场景关键词
